content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
P.O. Box 807 • 428 J Street • Sacramento, CA 95812-0807
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

March 29, 2002

Thomas Faimali
CSW/Stuber-Stroeh Engineering Group, Inc.
790 De Long Avenue
Novato, CA 94945

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-02-039

Dear Mr. Faimali:

This will confirm our telephone conversation of March 28, 2002, that you have withdrawn your request for advice. Thank you for your courtesy and cooperation in this matter.

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Holly B. Armstrong
Staff Counsel, Legal Division
